feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Strong Wind Watch
entry.summary: Southerly winds may approach severe gale in exposed places. Impact: Damage to trees, powerlines, and unsecured structures possible. Driving may be difficult, especially for high-sided vehicles and motorcycles. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: High. Changes: Duration extended.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 70 to 120 mm of rain. Peaks rates of 25 to 40 mm/h likely in localised downpours, with thunderstorms also possible. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and amounts may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 70 to 100 mm of rain. Peaks rates of 25 to 40 mm/h likely in localised downpours, with thunderstorms also possible. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low. Changes: Chance of upgrade increased from minimal to low.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, with thunderstorms and localised downpours possible. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Start time a little earlier.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, with thunderstorms and localised downpours possible. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Start time 3 hours earlier.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Rain is expected to turn to snow above 800 metres overnight Wednesday to Thursday. Expect about 1 cm of snow to accumulate above 800 metres during the early hours of Thursday. Further snow is possible later on Thursday.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Rain is expected to turn to snow above 700 metres Wednesday evening. Expect 1 to 3 cm of snow to accumulate about the summit with lesser amounts to 700 metres overnight Wednesday to Thursday. Further snow may fall later on Thursday.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Rain could possibly turn to snow about high parts of the road late this morning before clearing early afternoon. 1 cm may settle near the summit of the road. A further period of snow showers is expected on Thursday morning.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
